headline: Spruce Biosciences Further Strengthens its Commercial Leadership Team with the Appointments of Brian Walls as Vice President, Market Access and Darren Johnson as Vice President, Commercial Operations
summary: SOUTH SAN FRANCISCO, Calif., May 04, 2026--Spruce Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: SPRB), a late-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing novel therapies for neurological disorders with significant unmet medical need, today announced the appointments of Brian Walls as Vice President, Market Access and Darren M. Johnson as Vice President, Commercial Operations.
